targets.query: from(bucket: "netflow") |> range(start: -5m) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "traffic") |> group(columns: ["username"]) |> count() |> group() |> count()

from(bucket: "netflow") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "traffic" and r._field == "rx_bytes") |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: sum) |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with _value: r._value * 8 }))

from(bucket: "netflow") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "traffic" and r._field == "tx_bytes") |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: sum) |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with _value: r._value * 8 }))

from(bucket: "netflow") |> range(start: -30d) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "traffic" and r._field == "rx_bytes") |> group(columns: ["username"]) |> sum() |> group() |> sort(columns: ["_value"], desc: true) |> limit(n: 15)

from(bucket: "netflow") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "traffic" and r.username == "${username}") |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: sum) |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with _value: r._value * 8 }))
